_instructions: Add ArXiv papers to 'queue' to feature them in the next research pipeline run. They are processed in order and moved to 'archive' automatically. Accepts full ArXiv URLs (https://arxiv.org/abs/XXXX) or bare IDs (XXXX.XXXXX).

queue.note: Attention Is All You Need — the Transformer architecture that started everything
BERT — bidirectional pre-training that revolutionised NLP
GPT-3 — Language Models are Few-Shot Learners, scaling laws in action
InstructGPT — Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback (RLHF)
LLaMA 2 — Open foundation models from Meta, democratised LLM access
Mixtral of Experts — efficient sparse mixture-of-experts LLM from Mistral
DeepSeek-R1 — reasoning via reinforcement learning, shook the industry in Jan 2025
Vision Transformer (ViT) — An Image is Worth 16x16 Words, transformers conquer vision
Latent Diffusion Models (Stable Diffusion) — high-res image generation from latent space
LLaVA — Visual Instruction Tuning, multimodal LLMs
Chain-of-Thought Prompting — step-by-step reasoning in LLMs, Google Brain
RAG — Retrieval-Augmented Generation, grounding LLMs in external knowledge
ReAct — Reasoning + Acting in LLMs, foundation for AI agents
HuggingGPT / TaskWeaver — LLMs as controllers for multi-tool AI systems
AutoGen — multi-agent conversation framework from Microsoft
AlphaFold Multimer — protein complex structure prediction, Nobel Prize work
Multiple Physics Pretraining (MPP) — the cat videos vs physics paper from Miles Cranmer / PolymathicAI
Radio Galaxy Zoo foundation model — Anna Scaife's self-supervised learning for radio astronomy
Scaling Laws for Neural Language Models — Kaplan et al., why bigger models work
Chinchilla — Training Compute-Optimal LLMs, changed how we think about data vs params
Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) — simpler alternative to RLHF
LoRA — Low-Rank Adaptation, parameter-efficient fine-tuning that everyone uses
QLoRA — quantised LoRA, fine-tune 65B models on a single GPU
Flash Attention — IO-aware exact attention, made long context possible
Mamba — selective state space models, the leading alternative to transformers
KAN — Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks, a fundamentally different neural network architecture
VAE — Variational Autoencoders, foundational generative model
GANs — Generative Adversarial Networks, Ian Goodfellow's landmark paper
DDPM — Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models, the paper behind the diffusion revolution
GPT-4 Technical Report — multimodal capabilities at scale
Gemini — Google's multimodal model technical report
Sora — OpenAI video generation, world simulators as video models
DQN — Playing Atari with Deep RL, DeepMind's breakthrough
PPO — Proximal Policy Optimization, the RL algorithm behind RLHF
AlphaGo Zero — mastering Go from self-play, no human knowledge
ColBERT — efficient passage retrieval, foundation for modern search
Constitutional AI — Anthropic's approach to AI safety and alignment
Mistral 7B — punching above its weight, efficient open-source LLM
